ui.about_title: ជាង 20 ឆ្នាំនៃឧត្តមភាពក្នុងការចម្រោះទឹក
ui.about_desc: Eco Express Water គឺជាសហគ្រាសការពារបរិស្ថានបច្ចេកវិទ្យាខ្ពស់ដែលមានឯកទេសលើសម្ភារៈចម្រោះ និងឧបករណ៍ចម្រោះសម្រាប់ការបន្សុទ្ធទឹក។ បង្កើតឡើងក្នុងឆ្នាំ 1998 ផលិតផលរបស់យើងរួមបញ្ចូលគ្នានូវខ្សែសង្វាក់ពេញលេញពីការស្រាវជ្រាវ និងការអភិវឌ្ឍន៍ ការផលិត ការទីផ្សារ រហូតដល់ការគាំទ្របច្ចេកទេស។ ក្រុមហ៊ុនរបស់យើងមានទីតាំងនៅទីក្រុង Yuanhua ទីក្រុង Haining ខេត្ត Zhejiang ។ យើងមានក្រុមអ្នកជំនាញបច្ចេកទេសលំដាប់ទីមួយ ការសាកល្បងមុខងាររួមបញ្ចូលគ្នា និងមជ្ឈមណ្ឌលផលិតកម្មខ្នាតធំ។ យើងគឺជាអ្នកផ្គត់ផ្គង់តម្រងទឹកដែលទទួលបានវិញ្ញាបនបត្រ Halal ដែលឆ្លើយតបទៅនឹងតម្រូវការពិសេសរបស់អ្នកប្រើប្រាស់មូស្លីមនៅក្នុងប្រទេសម៉ាឡេស៊ី ឥណ្ឌូនេស៊ី និងប្រទេសមូស្លីមផ្សេងទៀត។
ui.about_feat_1: បង្កើតឡើងក្នុងឆ្នាំ 1998 – ជាងពីរទសវត្សរ៍នៃជំនាញផលិតកម្ម
ui.about_feat_2: ការរួមបញ្ចូលបញ្ឈរពេញលេញ៖ R&D, ការផលិត, QC, ភស្តុភារ
ui.about_feat_3: NSF, ISO, CE, and Halal certified manufacturing center
ui.about_feat_4: Professional OEM/ODM technical support for global brands
ui.about_feat_5: មានទីតាំងនៅ Haining, Zhejiang – មជ្ឈមណ្ឌលចម្រោះទឹករបស់ប្រទេសចិន
ui.why_eyebrow: ហេតុអ្វីជ្រើសរើសយើង
ui.why_title: ដៃគូផលិតកម្មដែលគួរឱ្យទុកចិត្ត
ui.why_desc: ចាប់ពីវត្ថុធាតុដើមរហូតដល់ការត្រួតពិនិត្យចុងក្រោយ រាល់ផលិតផលទាំងអស់ឆ្លងកាត់ប្រព័ន្ធត្រួតពិនិត្យគុណភាពដ៏តឹងរឹងរបស់យើង។
ui.why_card1_title: គុណភាពដែលទទួលបានវិញ្ញាបនបត្រ
ui.why_card1_desc: វិញ្ញាបនបត្រ NSF / ISO / CE / Halal គាំទ្រដោយរាល់បណ្តុំដែលយើងផលិត។
ui.why_card2_title: ត្រៀមខ្លួនសម្រាប់ OEM / ODM
ui.why_card2_desc: ការដាក់ម៉ាកយីហោ ការវេចខ្ចប់ និងលក្ខណៈបច្ចេកទេសផលិតផលផ្ទាល់ខ្លួន ដើម្បីស្របតាមទីផ្សាររបស់អ្នក។
ui.why_card3_title: ការផលិតក្នុងស្រុក
ui.why_card3_desc: ខ្សែសង្វាក់ផលិតកម្មចំនួន 4 គ្របដណ្តប់លើ PP, Carbon, Quick-connect និងការធ្វើតេស្តលេចធ្លាយ។
ui.why_card4_title: ការដឹកជញ្ជូនទូទាំងពិភពលោក
ui.why_card4_desc: រយៈពេលនាំមុខ 7-15 ថ្ងៃជាមួយនឹងភស្តុភារនាំចេញដែលបានបង្កើតឡើងទៅកាន់ 50+ ប្រទេស។
ui.products_eyebrow: ផលិតផលរបស់យើង
ui.products_title: ផលប័ត្រចម្រោះទឹកពេញលេញ
ui.products_desc: 42 ម៉ូដែលក្នុង 8 ប្រភេទ – ចាប់ពីស្នូលចម្រោះ inline រហូតដល់ម៉ាស៊ីនចម្រោះទឹកបញ្ឈរ និងប្រព័ន្ធ RO ពេញលេញ។

ui.workshop_desc: ខ្សែសង្វាក់ផលិតកម្មឯកទេសចំនួន 4៖ ស្នូលចម្រោះ PP, Carbon block, ស្នូលចម្រោះ Quick-connect និងការរកឃើញការលេចធ្លាយដោយស្វ័យប្រវត្តិ។

products.name: Alkaline Water Purifier System
products.desc: Produces alkaline water by increasing pH levels and adding essential minerals. Wholesale factory supply, customizable for OEM/ODM. NSF/ISO certified for industrial and commercial water treatment.

products.name: Antibacterial Mineralization Filter Cartridge
products.desc: Effectively removes harmful bacteria and viruses and adds beneficial minerals. Wholesale factory supply, customizable for OEM/ODM. NSF/ISO certified for industrial and commercial water treatment.

products.name: 30-inch Three Stage Big Blue Water Filter
products.desc: Three-stage filtration: PP filter (large particles), RO membrane (heavy metals, bacteria, viruses), CTO Carbon Block (chlorine, taste). Wholesale factory supply, customizable for OEM/ODM. NSF/ISO certified for industrial and commercial water treatment.

products.name: CTO Coconut Shell CTO Carbon Block Filter Cartridge
products.desc: Coconut shell activated carbon with high iodine value (1000) for effective purification. 10 inches length, 2.5 inch outer diameter. Wholesale factory supply, customizable for OEM/ODM. NSF/ISO certified for industrial and commercial water treatment.

products.name: Compressed Activated CTO Carbon Block
products.desc: High-density compressed carbon block for superior chlorine and VOC removal. Wholesale factory supply, customizable for OEM/ODM. NSF/ISO certified for industrial and commercial water treatment.

products.name: Industrial High-Flow CTO Carbon Block Filter
products.desc: Industrial-grade activated carbon block filter for high-flow chemical absorption applications. Wholesale factory supply, customizable for OEM/ODM. NSF/ISO certified for industrial and commercial water treatment.

products.name: Ceramic Filter Cartridge
products.desc: High-quality ceramic filter cartridge for removing fine particles and bacteria. Wholesale factory supply, customizable for OEM/ODM. NSF/ISO certified for industrial and commercial water treatment.

products.name: Multi-Stage Filter Cartridge Combination
products.desc: Combination of various filter cartridges designed for multi-stage purification. Wholesale factory supply, customizable for OEM/ODM. NSF/ISO certified for industrial and commercial water treatment.

products.name: Flat Cap CTO Carbon Block Filter
products.desc: Compressed Activated Carbon Block filter with flat cap connection for universal compatibility with standard housings. Wholesale factory supply, customizable for OEM/ODM. NSF/ISO certified for industrial and commercial water treatment.

products.name: Flat Cap GAC Filter
products.desc: Universal GAC filter with Flat Cap connection. Made with silicon rubber flat cap. Effectively removes chlorine, sediment, and other contaminants. Wholesale factory supply, customizable for OEM/ODM. NSF/ISO certified for industrial and commercial water treatment.

products.name: Flat Cap PP Melt Blown Sediment Filter
products.desc: Polypropylene melt-blown sediment filter with flat cap design. Designed for use in standard 10" filter housings. Wholesale factory supply, customizable for OEM/ODM. NSF/ISO certified for industrial and commercial water treatment.

products.name: Eco Express Water Housing Filter
products.desc: Carbon block filter using activated carbon compressed into a block. Removes chlorine, chloramines, pesticides, and odors. Wholesale factory supply, customizable for OEM/ODM. NSF/ISO certified for industrial and commercial water treatment.

products.name: Inline Cation Resin Filter Cartridge
products.desc: Softens water by removing hard minerals such as calcium and magnesium, reducing scale buildup in appliances. Wholesale factory supply, customizable for OEM/ODM. NSF/ISO certified for industrial and commercial water treatment.

products.name: Inline PP Cartridge
products.desc: Inline polypropylene sediment filter for compact water purification systems. Wholesale factory supply, customizable for OEM/ODM. NSF/ISO certified for industrial and commercial water treatment.

products.name: Small Molecule Antibacterial Mineralization Filter
products.desc: Advanced filtration removing harmful bacteria and viruses while adding beneficial minerals to water. Wholesale factory supply, customizable for OEM/ODM. NSF/ISO certified for industrial and commercial water treatment.

products.name: T33 Coconut Shell Carbon Inline Filter
products.desc: Post-filter T33 inline cartridge with premium coconut shell activated carbon for taste polishing. Wholesale factory supply, customizable for OEM/ODM. NSF/ISO certified for industrial and commercial water treatment.

products.name: Mineralized Small T33 Inline Water Filter
products.desc: Improves taste and odor by removing chlorine and adding beneficial minerals to water for improved health and hydration. Wholesale factory supply, customizable for OEM/ODM. NSF/ISO certified for industrial and commercial water treatment.

products.name: Maifan Stone Inline Filter
products.desc: Inline filter containing Maifan stones to mineralize water and improve taste. Wholesale factory supply, customizable for OEM/ODM. NSF/ISO certified for industrial and commercial water treatment.

products.name: Medium Size Water Filter w/ Copper Connector
products.desc: Medium-sized water filter cartridge featuring a copper connector for robust installation and performance. Wholesale factory supply, customizable for OEM/ODM. NSF/ISO certified for industrial and commercial water treatment.

products.name: Inline Mineral Filter
products.desc: Adds essential minerals back into purified water to enhance health benefits and taste. Wholesale factory supply, customizable for OEM/ODM. NSF/ISO certified for industrial and commercial water treatment.

products.name: Dark Green Water Dispenser MT-600DG
products.desc: Wall-mounted pipeline water dispenser with sleek modern design in unique dark green color. Saves floor space and provides continuous supply of clean water. Wholesale factory supply, customizable for OEM/ODM. NSF/ISO certified for industrial and commercial water treatment.

products.name: Golden Color Water Dispenser MT-900G
products.desc: Wall-mounted pipeline water dispenser with 5 stages of water volume (150ml–850ml) and 5 levels of water temperature (25°C–100°C). 316L titanium gold stainless steel heating element. Child safety lock. Premium golden glass panel. Wholesale factory supply, customizable for OEM/ODM. NSF/ISO certified for industrial and commercial water treatment.

products.name: Black Color Water Dispenser MT-B600
products.desc: Wall-mounted pipeline water dispenser with 2200W rated power and fast 3-second heating. Whole glass panel with matte spray plastic parts. Wholesale factory supply, customizable for OEM/ODM. NSF/ISO certified for industrial and commercial water treatment.

products.name: 1000W Vertical Water Dispenser MT-DV-E600
products.desc: High-power vertical water dispenser with 304 stainless steel tank and 1KW heating power. LED digital screen. Wholesale factory supply, customizable for OEM/ODM. NSF/ISO certified for industrial and commercial water treatment.

products.name: Wall Mounted Water Dispenser MT-E600
products.desc: Black & white dual-color wall-mounted pipeline water dispenser. Compact, energy-saving, with multi-stage water output. Wholesale factory supply, customizable for OEM/ODM. NSF/ISO certified for industrial and commercial water treatment.

products.name: White Color Water Dispenser MT-S800
products.desc: Wall-mounted pipeline water dispenser with 2200W rated power. Fast 3-second hot water output. 5 stages water volume and temperature adjustment. White glass panel. Wholesale factory supply, customizable for OEM/ODM. NSF/ISO certified for industrial and commercial water treatment.

products.name: Vertical Water Dispenser MT-V-E300A
products.desc: Vertical floor-standing water dispenser with 304 stainless steel water tank and multiple water outlet options. Black/White design. Wholesale factory supply, customizable for OEM/ODM. NSF/ISO certified for industrial and commercial water treatment.

products.name: Post T33 Inline Carbon Filter
products.desc: Post-filtration inline carbon filter for polishing water taste and removing residual odors. Wholesale factory supply, customizable for OEM/ODM. NSF/ISO certified for industrial and commercial water treatment.

products.name: PP Melt Blown Filter with Fin End Cap
products.desc: Industrial PP cartridge with a fin-style end cap for secure, leak-free seating in housing units. Wholesale factory supply, customizable for OEM/ODM. NSF/ISO certified for industrial and commercial water treatment.

products.name: PP Melt Blown Filter with Silicon Ring
products.desc: PP filter cartridge equipped with food-grade silicon sealing ring for high-reliability sealing. Wholesale factory supply, customizable for OEM/ODM. NSF/ISO certified for industrial and commercial water treatment.

products.name: Industrial PP Melt Blown Sediment Filter (SOE/DOE)
products.desc: Industrial-grade PP melt-blown filter, available in SOE (Single Open End) and DOE (Double Open End) configurations. Wholesale factory supply, customizable for OEM/ODM. NSF/ISO certified for industrial and commercial water treatment.

products.name: PP Melt Blown Sediment Filter Cartridge
products.desc: Melt-blown 100% pure polypropylene microfibers. Removes rust, silt, scale, sediment, dirt. Available in 10/20/30/40 inches. Wholesale factory supply, customizable for OEM/ODM. NSF/ISO certified for industrial and commercial water treatment.

products.name: PP Melt BlownF Polypropylene Fiber Cartridge
products.desc: Polypropylene fiber filter cartridge for sediment removal. Wholesale factory supply, customizable for OEM/ODM. NSF/ISO certified for industrial and commercial water treatment.

products.name: Pre-UDF Activated Carbon Cartridge
products.desc: Pre-filtration granular activated carbon cartridge to protect downstream membranes. Wholesale factory supply, customizable for OEM/ODM. NSF/ISO certified for industrial and commercial water treatment.

products.name: Ion-Exchange Resin Filter
products.desc: Ion-exchange resin cartridge for water softening and removal of heavy metals. Wholesale factory supply, customizable for OEM/ODM. NSF/ISO certified for industrial and commercial water treatment.

products.name: Reverse Osmosis (RO) Membrane Element Element
products.desc: Reverse osmosis membrane cartridge — the core component of RO systems for desalination and purification. Wholesale factory supply, customizable for OEM/ODM. NSF/ISO certified for industrial and commercial water treatment.

products.name: 400GPD High-Flow Reverse Osmosis (RO) Membrane Element
products.desc: High-capacity reverse osmosis membrane for residential and light commercial water purification. Wholesale factory supply, customizable for OEM/ODM. NSF/ISO certified for industrial and commercial water treatment.

products.name: Under-Sink Reverse Osmosis Water Filter
products.desc: Gravity-fed RO system relying on incoming water pressure to push water through the RO membrane. Multi-stage: sediment filter, carbon filter, RO membrane. Wholesale factory supply, customizable for OEM/ODM. NSF/ISO certified for industrial and commercial water treatment.

products.name: 304/316L Stainless Steel Industrial Jumbo Filter Housing
